curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #2384 (enable_xml_secure_processing branch). The fix adds FEATURE_SECURE_PROCESSING to the SAX parser factory in the constructor and restricts ACCESS_EXTERNAL_SCHEMA on parser instances in parseToNode. GlobalConfiguration.java was also modified to add a SECURE_PARSING config flag, but the vulnerability itself resides in XMLChangeLogSAXParser.java. No sibling XML parsers with the same vulnerability pattern were found in the same directory. Pre-assigned class 'xxe' is correct per CWE-611 and the patch content.
